_comment: Per-layer coverage baseline. CI gate fails if any layer drops >1pp below these numbers. Targets are the ADR-042 aspirational floors (not enforced — informational).

lib/api/.note: Lifted to 48.29% by maintenance + batch + search + auth Flask tests (2026-05-03). Phase C inventory now ~95% covered at the client layer.

lib/auth/.note: Above ADR-042 95% floor (2026-05-03). options.flask.test.ts adds 19 tests covering authorizeWithFlask happy/error paths, refreshAccessToken (Flask + mock branches), jwt() callback first sign-in/reuse/refresh, session() callback (asserts refreshToken NEVER leaks to client), and signOut event. 24.48% → 100% lines.

lib/hooks/.note: AI-shell-C action proposal flow raised from 26.47% to 32.06% lines (2026-05-01)

lib/modules/.note: Lifted from 0% by job-runner/types.ts isTerminalStatus tests (2026-05-03). Most schemas are declarations and don't move the line %.

lib/platform/.note: Lifted from 19.59% by Flask auth path tests pulling lib/platform/auth/types and the new maintenance/batch executor tests (2026-05-03).

lib/utils/.note: csv.ts has no tests yet; cn() in lib/utils.ts is fully covered

lib/utils.ts.note: Smoke test added in R-OPS-01 T01 — this file is the only fully-covered surface

components/shared/.note: Lifted from 0% by job-runner shared primitives — JobStatusBadge + JobProgress have render tests (2026-05-03).

components/shell/.note: Reset 2026-05-03 after Round 2 HIGH #1 — sentinel-based sanitizeExcerpt + defense-in-depth comments increase command-palette.tsx code surface; coverage % drop is structural, not test regression. Sanitizer logic itself is covered by command-palette.sanitizer.test.tsx (7 tests).

app/api/proxy/.note: ADR-042 target — currently no tests; tested implicitly by Playwright E2E

policy.comparison: current >= baseline - 1pp per layer; CI fails if any layer regresses
policy.baseline_update_rule: Baseline is updated when a story raises a layer's coverage by ≥5pp, OR when a deliberate ADR raises a floor
